ModMetadata.Name: Inspector Plus
ModMetadata.Author: SixFive7
ModMetadata.Description:
[h1]Inspector Plus[/h1]
Developer tool that dumps live Stationeers runtime state to JSON on demand for mod development.
Not intended for end-user gameplay. Subscribe only if you are writing or debugging a Stationeers mod.
[h2]Features[/h2]
[h3]On-Demand Snapshots via Request JSON[/h3] Drop a request JSON into [b]BepInEx/inspector/requests/[/b] specifying types and fields to inspect. The plugin writes a snapshot into [b]BepInEx/inspector/snapshots/snapshot_<timestamp>.json[/b] and deletes the request. This is the programmatic path: drop the file, get the result.
[h3]F8 Full-Scene Dump[/h3] Press F8 in-game to dump every MonoBehaviour in the current scene to the same snapshots folder in one shot. Useful for the first-pass "what is in the scene right now" survey.
[h3]Field, Property, and Unity Position Capture[/h3] Dumps private and public fields, computed properties, and Unity Transform positions. Walks nested objects to a configurable depth, with cycle detection.
[h2]Compatibility[/h2]
[b]Requires:[/b] [list] [*][url=https://docs.bepinex.dev/]BepInEx[/url] [*][url=https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad]StationeersLaunchPad[/url] [/list]
[b]Single-player and multiplayer.[/b] Works on any instance where it is installed. This is a developer tool; do not require it on a shared server.
[h2]Reporting Issues[/h2] If you run into a bug or something behaves unexpectedly, please open an issue on [url=https://github.com/SixFive7/StationeersPlus/issues]GitHub[/url]. Please include the mod name in the title so reports can be triaged. Steam comment notifications don't always come through, so GitHub is the reliable way to make sure a report is seen.
[url=https://github.com/SixFive7/StationeersPlus/tree/master/Mods/InspectorPlus]Source Code on GitHub[/url]
[h2]License[/h2] Licensed under the [url=https://github.com/SixFive7/StationeersPlus/blob/master/LICENSE]Apache License 2.0[/url]. Attribution required; see the LICENSE and NOTICE files at the repository root.
ModMetadata.ChangeLog:
v0.2.0: Generic walker fixes for any Unity game - Inline-expand plain serializable classes instead of stringifying them as (TypeName); shared with the UnityEngine.Object path so the same filter, private-include, and skip rules apply - Null-guard FindObjectsOfType and fall back to a reflection scan over live MonoBehaviours and static members so non-UnityEngine.Object types are still reachable - Cycle detection via reference-equality set; emit (cycle) when a reference recurs on the same chain - Hard caps on total serialized bytes, top-level objects, and nested expansions; emit a visible _truncated marker when a cap is hit - Wrap name, gameObject, activeInHierarchy, transform.position, and other Unity reads in try-catch so destroyed Unity wrappers never throw out of the walker - Top-level try-catch surfaces unexpected walker errors as an error key in the snapshot JSON - New maxMonoBehaviours request field (default 10000) lets callers raise or lower the top-level cap
v0.1.0: Initial release - On-demand snapshots via request JSON drop in BepInEx/inspector/requests/ - F8 full-scene MonoBehaviour dump - Field, property, and Unity position capture with configurable recursion depth and cycle detection
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: Inspector Plus Developer tool that dumps live Stationeers runtime state to JSON on demand for mod development. Usage: Press F8 in-game for a full MonoBehaviour dump, or drop a request JSON into BepInEx/inspector/requests/ for a targeted snapshot. Output lands in BepInEx/inspector/snapshots/. Not intended for end-user gameplay. For modders only.
